project_context.name: cloud.spot
project_context.user_requirements: Single front page (guest check / admin hidden login), JSON indexedDB storage, WA message sending with auto-download image, Language Switcher (EN/ID/JW).

theme_and_archetype.archetype: Archetype 3 (Pastel & Soft) infused with User's Deep Indigo
theme_and_archetype.reasoning: A dashboard utility needs clean structure, but for guest and local cafe usage it must feel soft and approachable. The user-requested Indigo/Violet is used as the high-contrast anchor in a sea of soft lavender and white backgrounds.

card.style: bg-white rounded-3xl shadow-[0_8px_30px_rgb(61,31,184,0.08)] border border-[#3D1FB8]/5 p-6 md:p-8

button.primary: bg-[#3D1FB8] text-white rounded-xl px-6 py-3 font-semibold transition-all duration-200 hover:bg-[#311894] hover:-translate-y-0.5 hover:shadow-[0_4px_15px_rgb(61,31,184,0.3)] active:translate-y-0
button.secondary: bg-white text-[#3D1FB8] rounded-xl px-6 py-3 font-semibold border border-[#3D1FB8]/20 transition-all hover:bg-[#EFEBFF]

input.style: bg-[#F8F7FB] border border-transparent rounded-xl px-4 py-3 text-[#1A1525] placeholder:text-[#B4B0C0] focus:bg-white focus:border-[#3D1FB8]/30 focus:ring-4 focus:ring-[#3D1FB8]/10 transition-all outline-none w-full

table.header: text-xs font-bold tracking-widest uppercase text-[#6A6577] border-b border-[#F8F7FB] pb-4

modal.container: bg-white rounded-3xl shadow-2xl w-full max-w-lg mx-auto p-8 border border-white/20

icons.strategy: Use stroke-width 2, round edges. Example uses: Cloud (logo), Wifi (stat), Users (stat), Clock (stat), Database (backup).

landing_background.description: Abstract light lavender background for the landing page hero section.

admin_avatar.description: Elegant portrait for the admin user card in the sidebar.

instructions_to_main_agent.routing: Since it's a single page static app with no backend, use React state to toggle between 'LandingView' and 'AdminDashboardView'.
instructions_to_main_agent.auth_logic: On the landing page input, if the user types 'admin123', immediately transition to the AdminDashboardView. Otherwise, treat it as a guest voucher check.
instructions_to_main_agent.voucher_logic: Voucher codes starting with '1M' mean 1 Minggu (Week), '1B' mean 1 Bulan (Month), '1H' mean 1 Hari (Day).
instructions_to_main_agent.storage: Use standard IndexedDB API (or a library like localforage) to store voucher lists. Save as JSON internally.
instructions_to_main_agent.whatsapp_integration: For 'Send Voucher', generate a wa.me URL. To auto-download the voucher image, use an HTML-to-canvas library (like html2canvas) to snapshot the voucher card element and trigger a download.
instructions_to_main_agent.language_switcher: Implement a simple i18n state dictionary mapping EN, ID (Indonesia), and JW (Jawa) keys. Toggle dynamically via sidebar.
instructions_to_main_agent.data_testid: CRITICAL: All interactive elements (inputs, buttons, language toggles, table rows, tab switches) MUST have a `data-testid` attribute (e.g., `data-testid='login-input'`).
instructions_to_main_agent.file_extensions: Use .js and .jsx extensions. Do not use .tsx or .ts.
